_comment: Provenance for advisories.json. Real pinned npm audit snapshot captured 2026-05-17 during WI-512 S3 implementation. Ranges normalized from npm <=X to harness-compatible <(X+0.0.1) format.
note: lodash@4.17.21 has 3 advisories: GHSA-xxjr-mmjv-4gpg (moderate), GHSA-r5fr-rjxr-66jc (high), GHSA-f23m-r3pf-42rh (moderate). All other 10 packages have 0 advisories as of 2026-05-17.
